response: Acme Corp, a business headquartered in Austin, Texas, employs 342 people and delivered a strong full-year financial performance in its most recent fiscal year, notching 18% year-over-year growth. Over the four quarters of that year, the company generated $12.3 million in revenue in Q1, $14.1 million in Q2, $11.8 million in Q3, and $16.2 million in Q4, which combined to a total annual revenue of $54.4 million, with the fourth quarter marking its highest-grossing period of the entire year.
